title: asphodelus albus var. deseglisei
intro: Asphodelus albus var. deseglisei, also known as the white asphodel or milk asphodel, is a perennial plant species within the asphodel family. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and diuretic properties, which can help treat conditions such as arthritis, kidney stones, and urinary tract infections. The health benefits of Asphodelus albus var. deseglisei include its ability to reduce swelling and alleviate symptoms of various ailments, as well as its potential to act as an antiseptic and antibacterial agent. Herbal preparations of the plant are often made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and can be used externally as a poultice or applied topically to affected areas.
